channel.title: mchinenFeed
channel.description: subscribe for latets updates on posts.

item.title: Milk & Cookies For Santa
item.description:
" childs play "

Open plastore, find trending instant mobile loan apps in Kenya. This was new , with little over some thousand downloads "ganji mobile loan app" "ganji" which means money in Kenyan slang and the company behind it , are in the business of helping the folks out with some quick cash that's after some PII - Personally Identifiable Information is pleged before any service is even offered. The reason an loan app need to read all my contacts and messages is some trojan horse play. But It's Been a while since I stimulated my lust for dissecting android applications; With the hope that this would be long engagement of poking and stripping. I downloaded the latest application package and uploaded it to my testing vm, this one's called stacy, "running stock blackarch" with neat tools. Unfortunately it only took `jadx` to finish the job .

🪲 The foreplay - Static Application Analysis

File information
Size : 18.62 MB MD5 : 2f11e6e52ba1ab6db967b841e395d22f SHA1 : 37806fe466c8252934ead66071aab4fd584d0647 SHA256 : 3750e569684cb2fec0291f19725476b9b37d777c73920b0aff6c8b0448fc0253

item.title: The Android Debug Bridge ( ADB )
item.description: The glory of the underated swiss army knife for the ignorant
